item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:name","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":false,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"Tie the hearing clause to an actual utterance by the thinker and make hearers know that the particular bearer is meant; the current separate CAN SAY and HEAR clauses do not encode that criterial designation relation, so the faithful flag is inaccurate."}
